title: ulmus carpinifolia var. suberosa
intro: Ulmus carpinifolia var. suberosa, also known as Cork Elm or Smooth-leaved Elm, is a variety of the Elm tree that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Ulmus carpinifolia var. suberosa include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant properties, making it a useful remedy for skin conditions and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
